items.name: scroll-rail
items.title: Scroll Rail
items.description: A dependency-free scroll-position navigation rail: a compact column of ticks pinned to one edge of a scroll container, one per stop, with hover previews and click-to-scroll. Ships a framework-agnostic vanilla core plus a React wrapper.
items.author: Lloyd Humphreys

items.name: workflow-button
items.title: Workflow Button
items.description: A dependency-free split button that drives an entity through workflow stages: the primary button advances one step (re-labelling itself per stage), and an attached caret menu lists every stage so you can jump anywhere the flow allows. Reachability is a predicate, so a one-way (DAG) flow that forbids going back is one line. Ships a framework-agnostic vanilla core plus a React wrapper.
items.author: Lloyd Humphreys
